procedures.name: Dental Implants
procedures.description: Dental implants are artificial tooth roots surgically placed into the jawbone to replace missing teeth. This multi-stage procedure provides a permanent solution that looks and functions like natural teeth.

procedures.name: Teeth Whitening
procedures.description: Professional teeth whitening treatments remove stains and discoloration to brighten your smile. Results typically last 6-12 months and are significantly more effective than over-the-counter options.

procedures.name: Dental Veneers
procedures.description: Porcelain veneers are custom-made shells bonded to the front of teeth to improve appearance, shape, and color. They provide a natural-looking solution for discoloration, chips, and misalignment.

procedures.name: Dental Crowns
procedures.description: A dental crown is a tooth-shaped cap that covers a damaged or weakened tooth to restore its shape, strength, and appearance. Crowns can be made from porcelain, ceramic, or other durable materials.

procedures.name: Root Canal Treatment
procedures.description: A root canal removes infected or damaged pulp from inside a tooth to relieve pain and save the tooth. This procedure prevents tooth loss and eliminates the source of infection.

procedures.name: Traditional Braces
procedures.insurance_coverage: Partial - varies by plan, typically up to $1500
procedures.description: Traditional metal braces use brackets and wires to gradually straighten teeth and correct bite issues. They remain the most effective option for severe misalignment and are suitable for all ages.

procedures.name: Invisalign & Clear Aligners
procedures.insurance_coverage: Partial - varies by plan, typically up to $1500
procedures.description: Clear aligners like Invisalign use a series of custom plastic trays to gradually move teeth into proper alignment. These nearly invisible aligners offer a discreet alternative to traditional braces.

procedures.name: Dental Bridges
procedures.description: A dental bridge replaces one or more missing teeth by anchoring artificial teeth to adjacent natural teeth. This fixed solution restores chewing function and prevents remaining teeth from shifting.

procedures.name: Dentures
procedures.description: Dentures are removable prosthetics that replace missing teeth and surrounding tissue. Both full and partial dentures provide an affordable solution for tooth loss and improve oral function.

procedures.name: Tooth Extraction
procedures.description: A tooth extraction removes a tooth that is too damaged, decayed, or impacted to be saved. This procedure is often necessary to prevent infection and maintain overall oral health.

procedures.name: Wisdom Teeth Removal
procedures.description: Wisdom tooth extraction removes problematic third molars that may be impacted, crowded, or causing pain. This common procedure prevents complications and improves overall oral health.

procedures.name: Dental Bonding
procedures.insurance_coverage: Partial if restorative; not covered if cosmetic
procedures.description: Dental bonding uses tooth-colored resin to repair chips, cracks, and gaps in teeth. This quick and affordable cosmetic procedure improves tooth appearance with minimal tooth preparation.

procedures.name: Gum Disease Treatment
procedures.description: Gum disease treatment addresses inflammation and infection of the gums and bone supporting teeth. Early intervention prevents tooth loss and systemic health complications.

procedures.name: Dental Cleaning (Prophylaxis)
procedures.description: Professional dental cleanings remove tartar and plaque buildup that brushing cannot eliminate. Regular cleanings are essential for preventing decay and maintaining overall oral health.

procedures.name: Deep Cleaning (Scaling & Root Planing)
procedures.description: Scaling and root planing removes plaque and tartar from below the gum line to treat early gum disease. This deep cleaning prevents progression and promotes gum healing.

procedures.name: Dental Fillings
procedures.description: Dental fillings repair cavities and tooth decay by removing the affected portion and filling it with durable material. Modern composite fillings are tooth-colored for a natural appearance.

procedures.name: TMJ Treatment
procedures.description: TMJ treatment addresses disorders of the jaw joint that cause pain, clicking, and dysfunction. Treatment options range from conservative therapies to surgical interventions.

procedures.name: Sleep Apnea Oral Appliance
procedures.insurance_coverage: Partial - varies by plan, often covered as medical
procedures.description: Oral appliances reposition the jaw and tongue to keep airways open during sleep, treating sleep apnea. These custom-fitted devices offer a comfortable alternative to CPAP machines.

procedures.name: Pediatric Dental Exam
procedures.description: Pediatric dental exams monitor children's oral development and identify issues early. Regular checkups establish good dental habits and ensure healthy tooth eruption.

procedures.name: Emergency Dental Care
procedures.description: Emergency dental care addresses urgent issues like severe pain, infections, and trauma. Quick treatment prevents complications and may save your tooth.
